name: First National Bullion Del Mar
description_short: First National Bullion Del Mar buys and sells precious metals with in-store consultations in downtown Del Mar, CA. Offers gold, silver, platinum, and palladium trading plus jewelry-to-cash services.
description_long:
First National Bullion Del Mar is a precious metals dealer and bullion buyer located at 1125 Camino Del Mar in downtown Del Mar, California. The company operates as part of the First National Bullion network and specializes in buying and selling physical precious metals including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. They provide real-time spot price displays for all major precious metals on their website, allowing customers to track market movements throughout the day.

The company offers several core services centered around precious metals transactions. Customers can buy bullion directly through their website or visit the physical location for in-store pricing and inventory. They purchase jewelry and turn it into cash on-site. First National Bullion Del Mar also facilitates precious metals IRA accounts, allowing customers to hold physical metals in self-directed retirement accounts. The business operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and encourages customers to call (858) 505-8846 or visit in person for exclusive pricing.

First National Bullion Del Mar distinguishes itself through a price-match guarantee, explicitly stating they will match or beat any local competitor's advertised price (subject to verification and their sole discretion). They emphasize local expertise through their dedicated Del Mar location with staff available for consultation. The company maintains strong inventory levels and provides both secure login account access and expert consultation via their national support line (1-800-866-0879).

As a precious metals dealer operating in the pawn-shop category, the company serves customers looking to invest in or liquidate tangible assets. However, the website provides limited detail on terms, fees, pricing spreads, or specific operational policies. The price-match offer includes explicit exclusions and reserves the right to refuse requests, suggesting terms may vary. No information is provided about credentials, licensing, or regulatory compliance specific to the Del Mar location.
address: 1125 Camino Del Mar UNIT C, Del Mar, CA 92014

company_info.headquarters: 1125 Camino Del Mar UNIT C, Del Mar, CA 92014

pros: Real-time precious metals pricing displayed on website (Gold, Silver, Platinum, Palladium spot prices updated daily)
Physical retail location in downtown Del Mar with dedicated staff available for in-person consultations
Price-match guarantee against local licensed competitors' advertised prices
Multiple service channels: in-store transactions, online shopping, phone expert consultation (858-505-8846 or 1-800-866-0879)
Precious metals IRA account offerings for retirement investment in physical metals
Jewelry-to-cash service available, converting personal items directly to funds
Secure customer login account system (MIDAS LOGIN) for account management
cons: Limited website information on specific fee structures, buying spreads, or selling markups applied to spot prices
Price-match guarantee contains vague exclusions ('Exclusions may apply') and reserves company's sole discretion to refuse
Current inventory warnings about 'brief shipping delays' due to historic prices and demand, limiting immediate availability
No published credentials, licensing information, or compliance certifications visible on the website
About-Us page appears broken or non-functional (404 error shown in provided content), limiting company background transparency
best_for: Investors seeking to buy or sell physical precious metals at current spot prices with local in-person verification
Customers looking to convert jewelry, gold, or silver holdings into immediate cash through a local buyer
Self-directed IRA account holders wanting to hold physical precious metals in retirement accounts
Buyers in the San Diego area willing to visit in-store for price matching and exclusive local deals
diagnosis: First National Bullion Del Mar is best for San Diego-area investors and jewelry sellers seeking to buy or liquidate precious metals with local in-person verification and the benefit of a price-match guarantee. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparency on fee structures, buying/selling spreads, and specific terms—customers should call (858) 505-8846 to confirm pricing and terms before transacting.
services: Buy physical gold bullion and coins
Buy physical silver bullion and coins
Precious metals IRA account setup and management
In-store price consultation and expert advice
Online bullion shopping with secure checkout
Customer account login and wishlist management
Real-time precious metals price tracking and charts
